name: abap2ui5-popups
description: Popup and dialog apps for abap2UI5 - confirm, inform, select, file up-/download, table, text edit, PDF, HTML, messages and more.

scripts.syfixes: find . -type f -name '*.abap' -exec sed -i -e 's/ RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE cx_sy_itab_line_not_found/ ASSERT 1 = 0/g' {} +
scripts.auto_downport: abaplint --fix .github/abaplint/abap_702.jsonc && npm run syfixes && npm run strip_trailing_ws && cp -f .github/abaplint/abap_702.jsonc abaplint.jsonc && npm run abaplintpathfix
